sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ فِيلْمًا عَلَى التِّلِفِزْيُونِ الذَّكِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je gledala film na pametnoj televiziji.
sentences.translationEn: The family watched a movie on the smart TV.

sentences.translation: Otac je odabrao film s interneta.
sentences.translationEn: The father chose the movie from the internet.

sentences.translation: Svi su sjeli zajedno i sretno ga gledali.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone sat together and watched it happily.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الْفِيلْمِ تَحَدَّثُوا عَنْ أَجْمَلِ مَشَاهِدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon filma razgovarali su o najljepšim scenama.
sentences.translationEn: After the movie they talked about its best scenes.
